prompt: Two robots cooperatively lift and move the table together.

name: humanoid_0010
prompt: The robot sweeps the trash into the dustpan and dispose of it in the trash bin.
prompt detailed: The robot uses the broom and dustpan to carefully collect the scattered trash from the clean, modern living space before discarding it properly into the nearby black trash bin. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.
json_upsampled_prompt:
{
  "scene_imagination": "Focus: A white humanoid robot with a black visor helmet mounted on a wheeled mobile base stands center-frame, holding a broom and dustpan, with scattered trash (paper, crumpled wrapper) on the light gray wood-laminate floor. Define: The robot has a white torso with visible black cables/wires, two articulated arms, and is mounted on a tall white rectangular column base with a circular wheeled platform. Refine: Behind the robot is a brown/taupe leather sofa with gray cushions; to the right is a front-loading washing machine and a black trash bin with a liner; to the left a man in black ERSAER-branded clothing sits in a chair operating VR/teleoperation controllers. Visualize: Over 5 seconds, the robot sweeps trash into the dustpan, lifts the dustpan, pivots right toward the black bin, and tips the contents in. name: humanoid_0012
prompt: The robot picks up the bottle of milk from the refrigerator using its robotic hand.

name: humanoid_0013
prompt: The robot uses its robotic hand to grasp the spatula and transfers food from the pan onto the plate.
prompt detailed: The robot, standing in a modern kitchen with wooden cabinets and sleek appliances, carefully grips the spatula with its robotic hand, scoops the food from the pan, and meticulously transfers it onto the plate placed on the counter. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

name: humanoid_0015
prompt: The robot use ite robotic hand to rearrange the colorful blocks on the table.

prompt: The robot vacuums the carpet in the living room using the vacuum cleaner.

name: humanoid_0023
prompt: The humanoid robot makes a standing long jump forward, leaping with both legs and landing steadily ahead.
prompt detailed: The humanoid robot is positioned close to the waterfront park, amidst lush green grass and calm waters. The humanoid robot makes a standing long jump forward, leaping with both legs and landing steadily ahead. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

prompt: The humanoid robot place the pink mug onto the plate.

name: humanoid_0035
prompt: The humanoid robot moves the pink mug to the right of the plate.
prompt detailed: The humanoid robot, positioned in front of a light wooden table and a plain white backdrop, carefully picks up the pink mug and places it to the right side of the blue plate with precision. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

prompt: The robot moves the red mug in front of the pink bowl.
prompt detailed: The robot, positioned in a minimalistic indoor setting with a plain white background, carefully picks up the red mug from the wooden table and places it directly in front of the pink bowl. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

name: humanoid_0044
prompt: The humanoid robot stacks multiple cardboard boxes in a work area.
prompt detailed: The humanoid robot, situated in a spacious industrial facility with organized shelves, workbenches, and mobile robotic units in the vicinity, carefully stacks several cardboard boxes in the designated work area by precisely aligning them one on top of the other. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

name: humanoid_0049
prompt: The robot decorates a dish with chopsticks in its right robotic hand.
prompt detailed: The robot, positioned in a modern kitchen with sleek blue walls and ambient lighting, uses its right robotic hand to carefully arrange the food on a dish using chopsticks, ensuring the presentation is both precise and aesthetically pleasing. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

name: humanoid_0054
prompt: The humanoid robot picks up a colorful stuffed animal from the wooden box.
prompt detailed: The humanoid robot carefully reaches into the wooden box, located in a neatly arranged room with a comfortable sofa and a glass cabinet displaying decorative items, and picks up one of the colorful stuffed animals. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.
json_upsampled_prompt:
{
  "scene_imagination": "Focus: A white-and-black humanoid robot with a reflective visor helmet, branded with Chinese characters '天工' on its torso, stands behind a wooden box of colorful stuffed animals. Define: The room features a beige sofa with brown cushions (left background), a white glass-front cabinet with decorative items (right background), tan curtains, ceiling-mounted panel lights, potted green plants, and a dark ceiling with exposed infrastructure. Refine: The stuffed animals in the wooden crate include a white seal/cat, a pink pig, an orange creature, and yellow duck/bunny plushies. The robot's arms are articulated with white/gray segments and black joints. prompt: The humanoid robot offers assistance to the person in the wheelchair.
prompt detailed: The humanoid robot provides thoughtful assistance to the elderly individual in the wheelchair within a bright and cozy room featuring a large window that allows natural light to illuminate the space. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

name: humanoid_0060
prompt: The robot runs alongside the dog in the natural environment.
prompt detailed: The robot runs alongside the dog through a shallow, rocky stream in a lush forest surrounded by tall trees and vibrant greenery. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.
json_upsampled_prompt:
{
  "scene_imagination": "Focus: A white-and-black Tesla Optimus humanoid robot with a reflective black visor and teal accent lighting runs through a shallow rocky stream alongside a medium-sized tan/brown dog. Define: The forest setting features tall pine and deciduous trees, vibrant green undergrowth, ferns, and moss-covered rocks lining the stream. Refine: Lighting is soft, diffused natural daylight filtering through the canopy, creating a warm golden-green palette with gentle bokeh in the background. Visualize: Both subjects move toward the camera — the dog slightly ahead on the left, splashing through the water with mouth open happily; the robot mid-stride on the right, arms swinging naturally. Analyze: Camera performs a gentle backward tracking shot at eye-level, maintaining the framing as both subjects run forward through the stream over 5 seconds. name: humanoid_0062
prompt: The humanoid robot jumps up and lands back on the floor.
prompt detailed: The humanoid robot, positioned in a gym-like setting with exercise equipment such as dumbbells, kettlebells, and stability balls scattered around, performs a vertical jump by bending its knees, propelling itself into the air, and landing back on the wooden floor in a controlled manner. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

name: humanoid_0065
prompt: The humanoid robot lift the red tray containing battery cells from the table.
prompt detailed: In the well-lit industrial facility surrounded by machinery and workstations, the humanoid robot carefully picks up the red tray filled with organized battery cells from the metallic table in front of it. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

prompt: The humanoid robot holds and operates a tool near the car hood.

name: humanoid_0084
prompt: The humanoid robot runs across an open field.
prompt detailed: The humanoid robot runs swiftly across an open field covered in short grass, surrounded by scattered trees and distant hills under a clear blue sky. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.
json_upsampled_prompt:
{
  "scene_imagination": "Focus: A white-and-black humanoid robot viewed from behind, running uphill on a grassy mound in a park setting. Define: The robot has a sleek white torso with black joints, a dark visor-style head, articulated hands, and shoe-like feet; it is mid-stride with one leg kicked back. Refine: The environment is an open landscaped park with short dormant grass, bare deciduous trees lining a path on the left, green leafy trees on the right, distant hills and water/river visible on the far left, and a clear blue sky. Visualize: Over 5 seconds the robot continues its swift running gait across the grassy field, moving away from the camera up and over the gentle hill, arms pumping naturally. Analyze: Camera follows from a low-angle rear tracking shot, maintaining the robot centered in frame as it ascends; natural daylight from above-left creates distinct shadows on the grass. name: humanoid_0085
prompt: The humanoid robot turns left and ascends the stairs.
prompt detailed: The humanoid robot, positioned in front of a modern building with gray concrete walls and a striking red architectural feature, makes a left turn and carefully ascends the wide, white stairs. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

prompt: The robot performs side kick in an outdoor artificial turf field.

name: humanoid_0091
prompt: The robot picks up the pillow from the table and places it on the sofa.
prompt detailed: The robot carefully lifts the gray pillow from the white coffee table situated near the beige sofa and places it gently on the sofa amidst a clean and modern living room featuring large windows with sheer curtains and cozy rattan chairs in the corner. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

name: humanoid_0096
prompt: The humanoid robot carries a cardboard box towards the stack of boxes.
prompt detailed: In a well-lit, organized warehouse setting with neatly arranged stacks of cardboard boxes and storage lockers along the walls, the humanoid robot carefully carries a medium-sized cardboard box and walks steadily towards the area where boxes are stacked. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

name: humanoid_0100
prompt: The robot picks up the trash from the sink counter and place it in the trash bin.
prompt detailed: In a clean and modern bathroom with a marble-tiled wall and a well-lit mirror, the robot carefully collects all trash items from the sink counter, including tissues and paper, and precisely places them into the nearby trash bin. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.
